steps.title: Identify the romantic painters' approach
steps.content: The key signal is the two-part structure: romantic paintings emphasize subjects' beauty or heroism while also hiding all imperfection. This describes amplifying positive qualities to conceal flaws.

steps.title: Find the word that fits amplification
steps.content: Exaggerate captures the romantic painters' strategy of amplifying beauty and heroism while concealing flaws. B, C, and D each miss: correct is illogical, undermine contradicts the emphasis, and mock contradicts hiding imperfection. This matches choice A — A is correct.
